title: Seplat Energy’s AGM Showcases Resilience and Ambition With Exceptional Performance - FinancialEDGE
description: Seplat Energy Plc's 12th Annual General Meeting (AGM) was a landmark event that brought together key stakeholders, media representatives, and industry experts in Lagos. The virtual meeting was a testament to the company's commitment to transparency, accountability, and stakeholder engagement. The AGM was attended by a diverse group of industry leaders, including, Odume Festus, Editorial/Project
html: Seplat Energy Plc’s 12th Annual General Meeting (AGM) was a landmark event that brought together key stakeholders, media representatives, and industry experts in Lagos.
